positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a celestial forest meeting a geometric desert landscape. The central subject is a wise, glowing owl perched on a crystalline branch that crosses a stylized moon crescent. The forest side features deeply saturated emerald greens, sapphire blues, and bioluminescent accents, represented by oversized, abstract flowers and glowing moss. The desert side uses warm terracotta, burnt orange, and deep indigo, featuring stylized cactus and minimalist rock formations. The composition must utilize strong negative space and bold, clean silhouettes. Artwork should be optimized for screen printing, with distinct, high-contrast linework and flat areas of color. Studio lighting, vector graphic quality, intricate linework, symmetrical composition, kawaii aesthetic, ethereal, fantasy.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, realistic, photo, messy, grunge, muted
